code: import React,{useState}from'react';import HomeScreen from'./components/HomeScreen';import BookingScreen from'./components/BookingScreen';import WaitingScreen from'./components/WaitingScreen';import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[screen,setScreen]=useState('home');const[departure,setDeparture]=useState('영주역');const[selectedDest,setSelectedDest]=useState(null);const[bookingInfo,setBookingInfo]=useState(null);const goToBooking=dest=>{setSelectedDest(dest);setScreen('booking');};const goToWaiting=info=>{setBookingInfo(info);setScreen('waiting');};const goHome=()=>{setScreen('home');setSelectedDest(null);setBookingInfo(null);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[screen==='home'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HomeScreen,{departure:departure,setDeparture:setDeparture,onSelectDest:goToBooking}),screen==='booking'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BookingScreen,{departure:departure,destination:selectedDest,onBack:()=>setScreen('home'),onConfirm:goToWaiting}),screen==='waiting'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(WaitingScreen,{bookingInfo:bookingInfo,onBack:goHome})]});}
